name: Modeboard
tagline: Switch your whole Mac workspace with one profile.
description: Bring your apps, Dock, wallpaper, Desktop, appearance, and Focus together with reusable Mac workspace profiles.

requiredPermissions: Automation access to System Events and Finder for supported setting changes
release.undocumentedBehavior: Some appearance, Dock, menu bar, and Desktop changes depend on macOS behavior that Apple does not document as a stable third-party API.
release.animatedWallpaperLimitations: GIF and video wallpapers play while Modeboard is running. Quitting Modeboard stops animated wallpapers. Static and captured Apple/system wallpapers remain applied.

commercial.licenseScope: One person, on up to three personally controlled Macs
commercial.perpetualAccess: Perpetual use of the purchased version; future major-version upgrades are not included unless Tideframe Labs says otherwise
commercial.activation: Internet is required for initial Lemon Squeezy activation. A device-only receipt is then stored in macOS Keychain for offline use, with occasional validation when a connection is available.
commercial.focusIntegration: Supported. A Modeboard profile can be connected to a macOS Focus Filter so a supported Focus change applies that profile automatically.
commercial.updateMechanism: Sparkle, with user-controlled automatic checks plus a manual Check for Updates command
commercial.refundPolicy: Refund requests may be submitted within 14 days of purchase. Eligibility is reviewed subject to applicable consumer law and may be limited where there is evidence of abuse, unauthorized distribution, or substantial use. Lemon Squeezy processes approved refunds as Tideframe Labs' merchant of record.
